opportunities.whyNow: AI tool adoption is accelerating. Audiences want practical, opinionated guides not generic lists.
opportunities.contentAngle: Show your ACTUAL workflow with specific AI tools, including what does not work
opportunities.exampleContent: The AI Tools That Changed My video-editing Workflow Forever (Honest Review)
opportunities.competitorGap: Most existing videos are feature demos. Show REAL results and time saved.

opportunities.whyNow: Evergreen format. Beginners always searching. High search volume, decent CPM.
opportunities.contentAngle: Frame as 'what I wish I knew': personal story builds trust and watch time
opportunities.exampleContent: 5 video-editing Mistakes That Cost Me 2 Years (Do Not Make These)
opportunities.competitorGap: Most beginner videos skip the emotional reality. Include the frustration and how to push through.

opportunities.whyNow: Transparency content is viral. Audiences are tired of unverified income claims and want real numbers.
opportunities.contentAngle: Show real numbers, real timeline, real failures alongside the wins
opportunities.estimatedReach: 20,000-200,000 views on YouTube (case studies outperform tutorials)
opportunities.exampleContent: My video-editing Income: Honest 30-Day Report (Real Numbers)
opportunities.competitorGap: Most income videos hide the struggles. Show the full picture including what did not work.

opportunities.whyNow: Annual 'best of' lists get renewed search traffic every year. 2025 searches starting now.
opportunities.contentAngle: Include lesser-known free alternatives to paid tools. This angle gets shared widely.
opportunities.exampleContent: Best Free video-editing Tools in 2025 (I Tested All of Them)
opportunities.competitorGap: Most tool lists are paid/affiliate-heavy. Include genuinely free options first.

opportunities.topic: Day in the life: video-editing creator
opportunities.whyNow: Behind-the-scenes content builds parasocial trust. Algorithm rewards authentic, unpolished content.
opportunities.contentAngle: Show the unglamorous reality alongside the wins. Authenticity drives follows.
opportunities.exampleContent: A Real Day in My Life as a video-editing Creator (Nothing Is Glamorous)
opportunities.competitorGap: Most 'day in life' videos are curated highlights. Real struggles + real victories drive engagement.

platformInsights.insight: Instagram Reels shown to non-followers is the primary growth vector in 2025. The algorithm rewards original audio, 7-15 second hooks, and content with high save rates.
platformInsights.actionableAdvice: Post 4-5 Reels per week at peak times. Use original audio when possible. Always end with a save-worthy tip.

platformInsights.insight: YouTube's 2025 algorithm prioritises satisfied viewers (long sessions, high retention) over pure view counts. Videos under 8 minutes get lower monetisation rates.
platformInsights.actionableAdvice: Aim for 10-20 minute long-form videos. Structure for 70%+ retention. Post Shorts alongside long-form for subscriber growth.
